content.json:
# NSP Lab — Workbook
Visual snapshots over the last 24h. Adjust the time range with the picker above.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Category in ('NetworkSecurityPerimeterAccessRule','NetworkSecurityPerimeterPublicAccessAttempt')
| extend resource = tostring(split(ResourceId, '/')[-1])
| summarize events = count() by resource, accessMode_s
| order by events desc
content.title: Events per resource

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Category == 'NetworkSecurityPerimeterPublicAccessAttempt'
| where result_s == 'Denied'
| extend resource = tostring(split(ResourceId, '/')[-1])
| project TimeGenerated, resource, accessMode_s, sourceIPAddress_s, operationName_s, matchedRule_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Denied public access attempts

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Category == 'NetworkSecurityPerimeterPublicAccessAttempt'
| where accessMode_s == 'Learning' and matchedRule_s == '_NoRuleMatched' and result_s == 'Allowed'
| extend resource = tostring(split(ResourceId, '/')[-1])
| summarize attempts = count(), sources = make_set(sourceIPAddress_s, 10) by resource, direction_s
| order by attempts desc
content.title: Would deny if Enforced (plan view)
